title: Solution Brainstorming
definition: Structured ideation to generate multiple solutions per validated opportunity.
whenToUse: After opportunities are mapped on an OST.
officeUse: Design sprints and OST solution branches.

title: Prototype Fidelity
definition: How polished a prototype is — matched to the assumption being tested.
whenToUse: Choosing how to build a test artifact.
frameworkSteps: Choose lowest fidelity that tests it
interviewPrompts: What fidelity would you use to test X?
officeUse: Sprint planning with design and engineering.

title: Concept Testing
definition: Showing a solution concept to users to gauge desirability before building.
interviewPrompts: What do you think this does?
Would you use this? Why or why not?
